title: EP: Empty password blocks submission
precondition: Login form is displayed with a password field and submit button.
test_steps:
Leave the password field empty.
Attempt to submit the login form.
expected_result: Login form submission is prevented, and an appropriate error message may be displayed.

title: DT: Password empty triggers block
precondition: Login form is displayed with a password field and submit button.
test_steps:
Ensure the password field is empty.
Attempt to submit the login form.
expected_result: Login form submission is blocked, preventing the login process.

title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: Login form submission is prevented. The user stays on the login page and is not navigated away.
